DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-10-2001 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Carole S. Cullum, Esq. 863-5300 for pltf & opposing party; Michael McMurray, 543-1224 deft & moving party in pro per.
RULING: The Court announced its tentative ruling as follows: Demurrer overruled; three-day notice adequate, timely served; 5 days to answer.
The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Order signed in open court.
